items.title: 红崖前的凝视者
items.description: 先把“人物面对巨像”的母题做成最稳的一张主海报。
items.prompt: cinematic still, lone woman seen from behind looking up at a colossal stone figure carved into a red cliff, northern China terrain, cold wind, red and gray palette, monumental scale, movie-like framing, realistic weathered rock, emotional stillness, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 洪原巨像前的少年
items.description: 让空旷平原和人物渺小感把情绪压出来。
items.prompt: epic cinematic image, small human figure standing in a vast floodplain facing a gigantic weathered statue, northern Chinese landscape, muted red soil and gray sky, monumental environment plus intimate human emotion, realistic film still lighting, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 风沙里的母子与石神
items.description: 北方风沙和亲子凝视会更有命运感。
items.prompt: cinematic red-gray movie still, mother and child pausing in a dusty northern landscape to stare at an enormous ancient colossus half-buried in earth, realistic windblown clothing, restrained color palette, emotional distance, monumental realism, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 赤原跪像与路人
items.description: 跪姿巨像比站姿更有故事感。
items.prompt: movie still, solitary traveler facing a kneeling gigantic stone colossus on a barren northern plain, red earth, gray haze, austere atmosphere, strong sense of scale and silence, realistic cinematic composition, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 县道尽头的晚霞巨像
items.description: 做一张更像中国北方县城边缘电影的场景。
items.prompt: cinematic Chinese northern county-road scene at dusk, one person standing by the roadside staring at a massive weathered colossus in the distance, red dust, gray concrete, melancholy movie still, realistic lighting and terrain, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 山脊上的叠面石像
items.description: 把 piles/stacks 的感觉融进去，画面更怪更高级。
items.prompt: surreal but realistic cinematic still, lone figure gazing at stacked colossal stone faces rising along a northern ridge, red-gray palette, harsh wind, monumental geology, movie frame quality, unreal-engine-5-like realism without fantasy excess, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 水库旁的静默巨像
items.description: 水库边这种北方地貌很容易出电影空镜味。
items.prompt: cinematic still of a woman standing by a bleak northern reservoir looking at a colossal human statue beyond the water, red-brown banks, gray sky, restrained palette, emotionally distant composition, realistic film lighting, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 断壁下的仰视者
items.description: 补一张更近、更压迫、更像电影剧照的版本。
items.prompt: close cinematic composition, man standing under a fractured monumental wall with a giant carved face above him, northern Chinese red-gray terrain, debris, dust, realistic scale, moody movie still lighting, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 薄雪巨像前的女孩
items.description: 北方薄雪会让红灰色更有层次。
items.prompt: cinematic northern landscape, young woman in a long coat staring at a snow-dusted colossus across open land, red earth mixed with pale snow and gray sky, monumental sadness, realistic movie-still quality, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

items.title: 峡谷尽头的双人凝视
items.description: 最后用双人关系收尾，像一部大电影的终章海报。
items.prompt: epic cinematic finale image, two small figures standing in a northern valley facing an immense colossus carved into layered red-gray rock, solemn atmosphere, realistic terrain, monumental scale, intimate human pause, movie poster quality without text, no logos, no watermark
